The Thesis

Organic Content Volume Wins in 2026

30 posts/month

A guess

vs
400 posts/month

Split testing at scale

1 dot = 10 posts

  • The best-performing ads already look like organic videos.
  • Viewership depends on attention, not audience size.
  • A winning format that works once will work repeatedly.
Proof of Concept

We've already built for Zencastr.

Zencastr India Campaign (SecondShift)

1.4M
Views
42
Creators

Videos

Interactions
SecondShift's Key Learning

Educational and feature-focused content dramatically outperformed comedy. Audiences wanted credibility and clarity from influencers who covered tools.

What GigMax Will Do Differently

Fewer influencers, higher volume of videos, more micro/nano creators posting fresh creative concepts on new accounts. This will allow us to properly gather data on formats without the influence of existing audiences.

The Activation

What a Zen.ai US Campaign Looks Like

3-month managed campaign. Fully done for you.

10 US Creators 400 Videos / Month Weekly Briefs
Week 1-2
Creator sourcing, vetting, onboarding. Creative playbook & tracking setup.
Day 14+
First videos live. Weekly performance reporting from day one.
Ongoing
Bi-weekly strategy calls. Format optimization based on data.
Educational
"I just made a podcast in 10 minutes with an AI producer."
Relatable / Lifestyle
"I've always wanted to start a podcast but..."
Hooks + Demo Walkthroughs
The AI producer, matching, earnings, clip creation.
Community
"I met someone on Zen.ai and we recorded our first episode."

The Math

Same budget. 20x the output.

Influencer Route GigMax Organic
$30K spend 20-30 sponsored posts 400+ organic videos/month
Testing Limited Multiple variations tested per format.
Winners emerge from volume.
Ownership Paid license / separate fee You own the usage rights to every video.
Speed 4-6 weeks to first post 15 days to first post

Zencastr India delivered 1.4M views at $0.007 CPV. Scaling that methodology to US/English with emerging creators and the vibecasting positioning is the play.
